messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A reboot silently kills the human's entire phone and Telegram surface — the front desk has no boot unit
What it solves: THE DEFECT. The bridge and the Telegram front-desk bot — together, the human's ENTIRE phone-card,
holistic-UI, Concierge and Telegram surface — are running on this box right now only because
something launched them by hand. There is no boot-persistent unit for them. A reboot takes the
human's only …
How it works: The front desk is among the services installed to start on boot
